notes: Canonical source bytes for this first audit pass are mirrored under refs/assets/design because the historical sugar3d/vida source tree is not present in this worktree. Provenance preserves the original source paths where known.

design/assets/app-icon.png.provenance: Current committed app icon baseline; no historical source bytes are present in this worktree.

design/assets/icon-back.svg.provenance: Current committed back icon baseline; no historical source bytes are present in this worktree.

design/assets/icon-replay.png.provenance: Reference replay chrome staged in design/theme.ts; historical source path not present in this worktree.

design/assets/level-node-completed.webp.provenance: Reference level-node art already present and bound via design/theme.ts; see docs/evidence/asset-swap-plan.md.

design/assets/level-node-current.webp.provenance: Reference level-node art already present and bound via design/theme.ts; see docs/evidence/asset-swap-plan.md.

design/assets/level-node-default.webp.provenance: Reference level-node art already present and bound via design/theme.ts; see docs/evidence/asset-swap-plan.md.

design/assets/level-node-locked.webp.provenance: Reference level-node art already present and bound via design/theme.ts; see docs/evidence/asset-swap-plan.md.

design/assets/marble-run-banner.webp.provenance: Reference menu banner staged in design/theme.ts; historical source path not present in this worktree.

design/assets/marble-shadow-tile.png.provenance: Reference modal backplate staged for settings/result chrome; see games/marble_run/evidence/2026-07-07-wooden-modal-backdrop/journal.md.

design/assets/ribbon-completed-blank.png.provenance: Derived from refs/assets/design/ribbon-orange.png by deterministic hue-remap to preserve the reference ribbon shape/shading while removing baked title text; used because @fabrikav2/ui owns the live result title.

design/assets/ribbon-failed-blank.png.provenance: Derived from refs/assets/design/ribbon-orange.png by deterministic hue-remap to preserve the reference ribbon shape/shading while removing baked title text; used because @fabrikav2/ui owns the live result title.

copy:result.lose.emoji.reason: Current v2 fail dialog still renders a text crying-face glyph while the Android reference uses fail-screen artwork; keep visible until replaced with reference art.
